initiatives.title: AI tools, training and support portal
initiatives.description: Arizona’s AI tools portal lists Microsoft Copilot, Google Gemini, Google NotebookLM, AI Verde, CyVerse, Zoom AI Companion, Adobe Firefly, SALT Center workshops, Disability Resource Center accessibility guidance, and teaching resources for the university community.
initiatives.significance: This converts the platform gap into named campus-supported tools and support channels with audience and access details.

research_centers.name: AI research or coordination activity
research_centers.focus: Public AI research, teaching, or tool coordination evidenced in cited sources.

computing_infrastructure.summary: University of Arizona HPC resources in the Research Data Center are available at no cost to researchers. Public documentation identifies Puma, Ocelote, and El Gato; Puma includes GPU nodes with NVIDIA V100 hardware, and buy-in documentation specifies 4 NVIDIA Tesla V100S GPUs per Puma GPU chassis. The recorded count reflects the six Puma GPU nodes x four V100S GPUs disclosed in public facility materials; Ocelote/El Gato add capacity but no current aggregate GPU count was found.

regulatory_context.summary: State and system AI context checked only at high level; institution-level sources carry the profile.

narrative_summary: The University of Arizona now has clearer platform and compute evidence. Its AI tools portal lists Microsoft Copilot, Google Gemini, Google NotebookLM, AI Verde, CyVerse, Zoom AI Companion, Adobe Firefly, SALT Center workshops, Disability Resource Center accessibility support, and teaching resources. Research compute is anchored in Research Data Center HPC systems Puma, Ocelote, and El Gato, with Puma GPU buy-in documentation identifying NVIDIA V100S GPU chassis and public facility materials supporting at least 24 disclosed Puma GPUs. The remaining public gaps are exact enterprise tool usage, contract values, all-system current GPU totals, AI budget totals, and student subgroup outcome metrics.

site:hpcdocs.hpc.arizona.edu Puma V100S GPU University of Arizona HPC
site:annualreport.it.arizona.edu University of Arizona HPC GPU hours Puma Ocelote
gaps_acknowledged: Leadership names and enrollment were not populated in this missing-only sweep.
Arizona lists multiple supported AI tools and support units, but no active-user counts or aggregate contract values were found.
Puma GPU hardware is partially disclosed; no current aggregate GPU count across Puma, Ocelote, El Gato, CyVerse, and AI Verde was found, and student subgroup outcome metrics remain unpublished.
